rule_metadata.name: SUSP_VCRuntime_Sideloading_Indicators_Aug23
rule_metadata.description: Detects indicators of .NET based malware sideloading as VCRUNTIME140 with .NET DLL imports
rule_metadata.author: Jonathan Peters

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule SUSP_VCRuntime_Sideloading_Indicators_Aug23
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects indicators of .NET based malware sideloading as VCRUNTIME140 with .NET DLL imports"
		author = "Jonathan Peters"
		date = "2023-08-30"
		hash = "b4bc73dfe9a781e2fee4978127cb9257bc2ffd67fc2df00375acf329d191ffd6"
		score = 75
		id = "00400122-1343-5051-af31-880a3ef1745d"

	condition:
		(filename == "VCRUNTIME140.dll" or filename == "vcruntime140.dll" ) and pe.imports ( "mscoree.dll" , "_CorDllMain" )
}
